market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Trump signs narrower executive order on AI oversight after industry objections
articles.description: After industry objections, President Trump signed a revised AI executive order requiring only voluntary prerelease government reviews of advanced models.

articles.title: Bitcoin faces an 'identity crisis' and DeFi devs need to stop acting like tech bros
articles.description: Solstice Labs CEO Ben Nadareski says developers must act like financial managers to win back institutional trust amid ongoing security exploits.

articles.title: Hyperliquid predicted 80% of oil move before traditional exchanges opened, says expert report
articles.description: TD Securities says "perpetual futures" are exploding beyond crypto as platforms like Hyperliquid outpace traditional Wall Street exchanges on everything from pre-IPO tech stocks to weekend oil trading.

articles.title: OpenAI launches new Codex tools for white-collar work
articles.description: OpenAI is getting serious about courting enterprise users. On Tuesday, the AI lab released a new set of capabilities for Codex, meant to expand the agentic tool’s uses in the workplace. Together with the new tools, the company released an internal report on how Codex is being used for knowledg

articles.title: Board, the new game startup from Mirror founder Brynn Putnam, raises $20M, has already sold thousands
articles.description: Board, the startup building what it calls "together tech" designed to bring people into the same room, has closed a Series A led by Union Square Ventures.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Password manager Dashlane says hackers stole some customers’ password vaults
articles.description: The password manager giant said hackers were able to 'brute-force' its two-factor system, allowing them to access customer accounts and download their password vaults.

articles.title: Here's how one decentralized cloud provider says private citizens can make money from AI
articles.description: Titan Network says its crowdsourced computing network has signed tech giants like Tencent and Alibaba as clients, saving them as much 75% on AI costs.

articles.title: Zama accelerates compliance after court lifts $12.5M USDC freeze
articles.description: Privacy protocol Zama says it will accelerate compliance measures after a court lifted a $12.5 million USDC freeze tied to an unrelated legal dispute.

articles.title: Gary Vaynerchuk says AI is creating the biggest opportunity ever for entrepreneurs
articles.description: AI is reshaping business faster than most leaders realize, and Gary Vaynerchuk argues the biggest winners will be creative builders willing to adapt.

articles.title: Turning your purse into a cyberdeck is the most fun way to resist big tech
articles.description: The women building these over-the-top, bedazzled cyberdecks aren’t in it for the glitter alone. This trend is reaching its peak at a time when people feel powerless against big tech.

articles.title: 倉和5月營收1.21 億元
articles.description: 倉和（6538）今（2）日公布 5 月營收，達 1.21 億元，較 4 月成長 -7.1%，較去年同期成長 - […]

articles.title: Hyperliquid is beating ethereum in trading volume on some days as big money rotates, says FalconX
articles.description: Institutional investors are ditching range-bound bitcoin and ether for Hyperliquid as the decentralized platform wins over hedge funds with massive liquidity and early access to hot markets, according to Joshua Lim, head of markets at FalconX.

articles.title: Why VivaTech 2026 is the place to see Europe’s AI strategy take shape
articles.description: The global AI race is often framed as a battle between the United States and China. But at VivaTech, Europe is expected to make the case for an entirely different model.

articles.title: Georgia targets illegal crypto mining in Mestia crackdown: Report
articles.description: Georgia will reportedly install electricity meters across Mestia to curb illegal crypto mining after officials blamed miners for grid strain and outages.

articles.title: Meta tests ‘Series’ for episodic Reels on Instagram and Facebook
articles.description: Meta told TechCrunch that it's considering ways to monetize the new feature, but didn't share specifics on what that could look like.

articles.title: 明泰5月營收18.01 億元
articles.description: 明泰（3380）今（2）日公布 5 月營收，達 18.01 億元，較 4 月成長 64.6%，較去年同期成長  […]

articles.title: Kaiko acquires Amberdata in blockchain data consolidation push
articles.description: Kaiko acquired Amberdata to expand its institutional crypto data platform with derivatives analytics, onchain tools and AI-powered research.

articles.title: Apple’s MacBook Neo is winning over a new generation of buyers
articles.description: The MacBook Neo shipped 1.1 million units in its first weeks on sale, IDC estimates, as Apple pushes deeper into the mainstream laptop market.

articles.title: 晶豪科5月營收月減3.6%
articles.description: 晶豪科（3006）公布 5 月合併營收 44.67 億元，較上（4）月成長 -3.6%，與去年同期相比為年增  […]
